Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server

Class RestServerConstants

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestServerConstants
public final class RestServerConstants extends Object
Static literals for juneau-rest-server: annotation attribute name constants used for allowlist inheritance checks and other module-internal logic.

HTTP wire names shared with clients belong on RestSharedConstants instead.

See Also:
  • RestSharedConstants

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    API_KEY_HEADER
    Default header name read by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.ApiKeyGuard when configured with the HEADER source and no custom name is supplied.
    static final String
    PRINCIPAL_ATTR
    Servlet-request attribute key under which the authenticated Principal is stashed by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.BearerTokenGuard / org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.ApiKeyGuard and resolved by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.AuthArg for @Auth Principal parameters.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_allowedHeaderParams
    The "allowedHeaderParams" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_allowedMethodHeaders
    The "allowedMethodHeaders" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_allowedMethodParams
    The "allowedMethodParams" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_allowedParserOptions
    The "allowedParserOptions" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_allowedSerializerOptions
    The "allowedSerializerOptions" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_asyncCompletionExecutor
    The "asyncCompletionExecutor" annotation attribute name — names a Executor bean (resolved from the resource's BeanStore) that routes CompletableFuture completion callbacks through a dedicated thread pool instead of the future's natural completion thread.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_asyncTimeoutMillis
    The "asyncTimeoutMillis" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to override the default 30-second timeout applied by AsyncResponseProcessor to CompletableFuture-returning handlers.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_authenticator
    The "authenticator" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the child-resource inheritance walk when resolving the RestAuthenticator.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_callLogger
    The "callLogger" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the call logger.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_clientVersion
    The "clientVersion" annotation attribute name — folded into PROPERTY_matchers for op-level matchers (drives ClientVersionMatcher injection).
    static final String
    PROPERTY_clientVersionHeader
    The "clientVersionHeader" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_consumes
    The "consumes" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to block class-level @Rest(consumes) from contributing to an op, and as the property name for the @Rest(consumes) chain walk in RestContext.getConsumes().
    static final String
    PROPERTY_converters
    The "converters" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations to block class-level @Rest(converters) from contributing to an op.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_debug
    The "debug" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_debugDefault
    Property name for the debugDefault setting.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_debugEnablement
    The "debugEnablement" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the debug enablement bean.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_defaultAccept
    The "defaultAccept" annotation attribute name — folded into PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_defaultCharset
    The "defaultCharset" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on both @RestOp / verb annotations (op-level noInherit blocks the @Rest(defaultCharset) fallback) and @Rest annotations (class-level noInherit cuts off the resource-class hierarchy walk).
    static final String
    PROPERTY_defaultContentType
    The "defaultContentType" annotation attribute name — folded into PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_defaultRequestAttributes
    The "defaultRequestAttributes" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_defaultRequestFormData
    The "defaultRequestFormData" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_defaultRequestHeaders
    The "defaultRequestHeaders" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_defaultRequestQueryData
    The "defaultRequestQueryData" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_defaultResponseHeaders
    The "defaultResponseHeaders" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_disableContentParam
    The "disableContentParam" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_eagerInit
    The "eagerInit" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_encoders
    The "encoders" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_guards
    The "guards" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations to block class-level @Rest(guards) (and roleGuard / rolesDeclared) from contributing to an op.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_httpMethod
    The "httpMethod" / "method" surface — reserved for noInherit matching; op HTTP method has no RestContext scalar fallback.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_lazyChildren
    The "lazyChildren" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to opt the parent resource into deferred (first-invocation) construction of its @Rest(children=...) sub-resources instead of the default eager construction at startup.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_matchers
    The "matchers" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_maxInput
    The "maxInput" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on both @RestOp / verb annotations (op-level noInherit blocks the @Rest(maxInput) fallback) and @Rest annotations (class-level noInherit cuts off the resource-class hierarchy walk).
    static final String
    PROPERTY_messages
    The "messages" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving message bundle locations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_metricName
    The "metricName" annotation attribute name — per-op override for the metric name passed to record().
    static final String
    PROPERTY_metricTags
    The "metricTags" annotation attribute name — per-op additional metric tags passed to record().
    static final String
    PROPERTY_mixins
    The "mixins" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the class-chain walk when resolving operation mixins.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_noInherit
    The "noInherit" annotation attribute name.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_observability
    The "observability" annotation attribute name — tri-state per-resource / per-op observability control.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_openApiProvider
    The "openApiProvider" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the OpenAPI 3.1 provider bean.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_parsers
    The "parsers" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_partParser
    The "partParser" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_partSerializer
    The "partSerializer" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_path
    The "path" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_paths
    The "paths" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the class-chain walk when resolving top-level multi-mount path specs.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_problemDetails
    The "problemDetails" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to opt the resource (or one of its router parents) into RFC 7807 application/problem+json error responses.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_produces
    The "produces" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to block class-level @Rest(produces) from contributing to an op, and as the property name for the @Rest(produces) chain walk in RestContext.getProduces().
    static final String
    PROPERTY_renderResponseStackTraces
    The "renderResponseStackTraces" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_responseProcessors
    The "responseProcessors" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the response-processor list.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_restOpArgs
    The "restOpArgs" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the per-operation argument resolver list.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_roleGuard
    The "roleGuard" annotation attribute name — folded into PROPERTY_guards for op-level guards.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_rolesDeclared
    The "rolesDeclared" annotation attribute name — folded into PROPERTY_guards for op-level guards (drives RoleBasedRestGuard role-name set).
    static final String
    PROPERTY_serializers
    The "serializers" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @RestOp / verb annotations.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_staticFiles
    The "staticFiles" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the static files bean.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_swaggerProvider
    The "swaggerProvider" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the resource-class hierarchy walk when resolving the swagger provider bean.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_uriAuthority
    The "uriAuthority" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_uriContext
    The "uriContext" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_uriRelativity
    The "uriRelativity" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_uriResolution
    The "uriResolution" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_value
    The "value" annotation attribute name — used by @RestOp/verb annotations to hold the (optional method-prefixed) path; folded into PROPERTY_path.
    static final String
    PROPERTY_virtualThreads
    The "virtualThreads" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to opt the resource (or one of its @RestOp-annotated methods) into per-request virtual-thread dispatch on Java 21+.
    static final String
    REQUEST_ID
    Servlet-request attribute key under which the per-request id minted or honored by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.filter.RequestIdFilter is stashed.

    • PROPERTY_problemDetails

      public static final String PROPERTY_problemDetails
      The "problemDetails" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to opt the resource (or one of its router parents) into RFC 7807 application/problem+json error responses.
      See Also:

    • PROPERTY_eagerInit

      public static final String PROPERTY_eagerInit
      The "eagerInit" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_lazyChildren

      public static final String PROPERTY_lazyChildren
      The "lazyChildren" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to opt the parent resource into deferred (first-invocation) construction of its @Rest(children=...) sub-resources instead of the default eager construction at startup.
      See Also:
      • Rest.lazyChildren()
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_virtualThreads

      public static final String PROPERTY_virtualThreads
      The "virtualThreads" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to opt the resource (or one of its @RestOp-annotated methods) into per-request virtual-thread dispatch on Java 21+. On runtimes older than Java 21 the flag is logged once and ignored.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_asyncTimeoutMillis

      public static final String PROPERTY_asyncTimeoutMillis
      The "asyncTimeoutMillis" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching to override the default 30-second timeout applied by AsyncResponseProcessor to CompletableFuture-returning handlers. "0" disables the timeout entirely.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_asyncCompletionExecutor

      public static final String PROPERTY_asyncCompletionExecutor
      The "asyncCompletionExecutor" annotation attribute name — names a Executor bean (resolved from the resource's BeanStore) that routes CompletableFuture completion callbacks through a dedicated thread pool instead of the future's natural completion thread. Empty string (default) = no override.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_clientVersionHeader

      public static final String PROPERTY_clientVersionHeader
      The "clientVersionHeader" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      The "uriAuthority" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching.

    • PROPERTY_defaultCharset

      public static final String PROPERTY_defaultCharset
      The "defaultCharset" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on both @RestOp / verb annotations (op-level noInherit blocks the @Rest(defaultCharset) fallback) and @Rest annotations (class-level noInherit cuts off the resource-class hierarchy walk).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_paths

      public static final String PROPERTY_paths
      The "paths" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the class-chain walk when resolving top-level multi-mount path specs.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_mixins

      public static final String PROPERTY_mixins
      The "mixins" annotation attribute name — used in noInherit matching on @Rest annotations to cut off the class-chain walk when resolving operation mixins.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_value

      public static final String PROPERTY_value
      The "value" annotation attribute name — used by @RestOp/verb annotations to hold the (optional method-prefixed) path; folded into PROPERTY_path.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_observability

      public static final String PROPERTY_observability
      The "observability" annotation attribute name — tri-state per-resource / per-op observability control. "true" opts the resource in and requires a wired backend (startup-fail if missing); "false" short-circuits the observability block entirely; "" (default) inherits / uses the existing silent-no-op behavior.
      See Also:
      • Rest.observability()
      • RestOp.observability()
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_metricName

      public static final String PROPERTY_metricName
      The "metricName" annotation attribute name — per-op override for the metric name passed to record(). Empty string (default) uses the recorder's own default name derivation.
      See Also:
      • RestOp.metricName()
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROPERTY_metricTags

      public static final String PROPERTY_metricTags
      The "metricTags" annotation attribute name — per-op additional metric tags passed to record(). Format: comma-separated key=value pairs (e.g. "team=payments,region=us-east"). Empty string (default) means no additional tags.
      See Also:
      • RestOp.metricTags()
      • Constant Field Values

    • REQUEST_ID

      public static final String REQUEST_ID
      Servlet-request attribute key under which the per-request id minted or honored by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.filter.RequestIdFilter is stashed.

      Call loggers and observability layers should resolve the id via this key so they all see the same value:

      String id = (String)req.getAttribute(RestServerConstants.REQUEST_ID);

      Since:
      10.0.0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PRINCIPAL_ATTR

      public static final String PRINCIPAL_ATTR
      Servlet-request attribute key under which the authenticated Principal is stashed by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.BearerTokenGuard / org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.ApiKeyGuard and resolved by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.AuthArg for @Auth Principal parameters.

      Op handlers can resolve the principal via the typed argument injector:

      @RestGet(path="/me") public Profile me(@Auth Principal p) { ... }

      Or directly:

      Principal p = (Principal)req.getAttribute(RestServerConstants.PRINCIPAL_ATTR);

      Since:
      10.0.0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • API_KEY_HEADER

      public static final String API_KEY_HEADER
      Default header name read by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.ApiKeyGuard when configured with the HEADER source and no custom name is supplied.
      Since:
      10.0.0
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
